title: COverlap: a Fiji co-localization toolset (Supplementary material)
author: Ambroset, Mélodie
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Supplementary material for the COverlap toolset, a 4 steps Fiji/ImageJ toolset intended for the co-localization of two nuclear markers on multichannel Z-stack confocal images.  Testing Files.zip is a sample dataset that allows testing of the toolset.  protocol-IHC_DAPI405_Lectin488_EdU555_ERG633.xlsx is the immunohistochemistry protocol used to stain the 50µm rat brain slices on which the sample dataset images were acquired.  ImageAcquisition_Specs.docx contains the specifications of our image acquisition protocol (Microscopy checklist generated with   Rebecca Senft's app  and  FPbase spectra viewer )  ARRIVE_Checklist.pdf contains the  ARRIVE  guidelines 2.0 author checklist

ImageAcquisition_Specs.docx contains the specifications of our image acquisition protocol (Microscopy checklist generated with   Rebecca Senft's app  and  FPbase spectra viewer )  ARRIVE_Checklist.pdf contains the  ARRIVE  guidelines 2.0 author checklist
